info.name: GraphQL – Jobs Module
info.description: Scheduler jobs via root `jobs`. Email jobs: `LAMBDA_EMAIL_*` (email.server). Import/export: `CONNECTRA_*` (sync.server). Queries: `job(jobId)`, `jobs(limit, offset, status, jobType, jobFamily)`. On `SchedulerJob` request `statusPayload`, `sourceService`, `jobFamily`, `jobSubtype`. `timelinePayload`/`dagPayload` are null. Mutations: create exports/imports, `pauseJob`/`resumeJob`/`terminateJob` (email only), `retryJob`. Env: `{{jobUuid}}`, `{{s3Bucket}}`, `{{fileKey}}`. See `contact360.io/api` `app/graphql/modules/jobs/`.

body.raw: {"query":"query GetJob($jobId: ID!) { jobs { job(jobId: $jobId) { id jobId userId jobType status sourceService jobFamily jobSubtype requestPayload responsePayload statusPayload createdAt updatedAt timelinePayload dagPayload } } }","variables":{"jobId":"{{jobUuid}}"}}

request.description: Single scheduler job. statusPayload from email satellite or DB depending on sourceService.

body.raw: {"query":"query ListJobs($limit: Int, $offset: Int, $status: String, $jobType: String, $jobFamily: String) { jobs { jobs(limit: $limit, offset: $offset, status: $status, jobType: $jobType, jobFamily: $jobFamily) { jobs { id jobId jobType status sourceService jobFamily jobSubtype createdAt } pageInfo { total limit offset hasNext hasPrevious } } } }","variables":{"limit":25,"offset":0,"status":null,"jobType":null,"jobFamily":null}}

{"query":"mutation CreateEmailFinderExport($input: CreateEmailFinderExportInput!) { jobs { createEmailFinderExport(input: $input) { id jobId jobType status sourceService jobFamily jobSubtype createdAt } } }","variables":{"input":{"s3Bucket":"{{s3Bucket}}","inputCsvKey":"{{fileKey}}","outputPrefix":"exports/email-finder/","rowLimit":100,"chunkSize":10,"retryCount":3,"retryInterval":5}}}

request.description: `inputCsvKey` = fileKey from Upload module after completeUpload.

body.raw: {"query":"mutation CreateEmailVerifyExport($input: CreateEmailVerifyExportInput!) { jobs { createEmailVerifyExport(input: $input) { id jobId jobType status sourceService jobFamily jobSubtype createdAt } } }","variables":{"input":{"s3Bucket":"{{s3Bucket}}","inputCsvKey":"{{fileKey}}","outputPrefix":"exports/email-verify/","rowLimit":100,"chunkSize":10,"retryCount":3,"retryInterval":5}}}

{"query":"mutation CreateContact360Export($input: CreateContact360ExportInput!) { jobs { createContact360Export(input: $input) { id jobId jobType status sourceService jobFamily jobSubtype createdAt } } }","variables":{"input":{"outputPrefix":"exports/contact360/","service":"contact","vql":{"where":{},"selectColumns":["first_name","last_name","email"],"limit":1000},"sliceCount":4,"pageSize":1000,"retryCount":2,"retryInterval":5}}}

{"query":"mutation CreateContact360Import($input: CreateContact360ImportInput!) { jobs { createContact360Import(input: $input) { id jobId jobType status sourceService jobFamily jobSubtype createdAt } } }","variables":{"input":{"s3Bucket":"{{s3Bucket}}","s3Key":"{{fileKey}}","importTarget":"contact","outputPrefix":"imports/contact360/","chunkCount":8,"retryCount":3,"retryInterval":5}}}
{"query":"mutation PauseJob($input: PauseJobInput!) { jobs { pauseJob(input: $input) { id jobId status sourceService } } }","variables":{"input":{"jobId":"{{jobUuid}}"}}}
{"query":"mutation ResumeJob($input: ResumeJobInput!) { jobs { resumeJob(input: $input) { id jobId status sourceService } } }","variables":{"input":{"jobId":"{{jobUuid}}"}}}
{"query":"mutation TerminateJob($input: TerminateJobInput!) { jobs { terminateJob(input: $input) { id jobId status sourceService } } }","variables":{"input":{"jobId":"{{jobUuid}}"}}}

request.description: Returns scalar JSON. Do not select subfields.
